ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED(Stage_Status__c) && TEXT(Stage_Status__c) = 'Completed' && TEXT(Stage__c) = 'Demands & Progressive Collections' && ISPICKVAL(Funding_Type__c, 'Self') && Pending_Amount__c > 0
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Pending Amount is greater than Zero, Cannot mark the stage as Completed
